violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment has employee certified through an approved food safety management course. Employee must register with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety Manager. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Food thermometer must be obtained. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must register an employee certified through an approved food safety management course with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety Manager. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2025
Spray bottle used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies was not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

One of the individual cutting boards (green) is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety (food safety management, not food handler) at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Employee(s) must register in, and successfully complete, an approved course in food safety management. Employee(s) must register with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as Certified Food Safety Manager. Resources provided. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024

Individual cutting boards observed to be very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024

Refrigerator #1 was observed held at 43 degrees Fahrenheit. Milk observed with a temperature of 43 degrees F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. TCS foods moved to refrigerator #2 with an ambient temperature of 40 degrees F. Service call placed. TCS foods not to be stored in this unit until it is serviced and maintaining a consistent temperature at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023
Dishwasher observed in poor repair, leaking. Dishwasher must be properly repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/12/2023
